name: Example for a kayak trip dataset
abstract: A building block to show semantic uplift from dataset definition to schema.
annotatedSchema:
$schema: http://json-schema.org/draft/2019-09/schema
$id: http://localhost:5000/collections/kayak_trips/schema
type: object
title: kayak_trips
properties:
  geometry:
    format: geometry-any
    x-jsonld-id: http://example.org/ontology/geometry
    x-jsonld-type: '@id'
  fid:
    type: number
  name:
    type: string
  cmt:
    type: string
  desc:
    type: string
  src:
    type: string
  type:
    type: string
    x-jsonld-id: http://example.org/ontology/type
  boat_type:
    type: number
x-jsonld-extra-terms:
  naam: http://example.org/ontology/naam
  poi_id: http://example.org/ontology/poi_id
x-jsonld-prefixes:
  ex: http://example.org/ontology/
  dct: http://purl.org/dc/terms/
  dcat: http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#
  skos: http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#
  vcard: http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#
  foaf: http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/
